section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc.
sentence: Effective Date: February 26, 2025 Last Updated: February 26, 2025

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:1. Introduction
sentence: Luxand, Inc. ("Luxand," "we," "us," or "our") provides facial recognition technology, AI image generation services, and related software products. We are committed to protecting the privacy of individuals whose data we process.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:1. Introduction
sentence: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, how long we retain it, and what rights you have. It applies to all Luxand websites, products, and services, including: luxand.cloud — Cloud-based Face Recognition API

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:1. Introduction
sentence: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, how long we retain it, and what rights you have. It applies to all Luxand websites, products, and services, including: BabyFaceGenerator.com (and similar entertainment services such as Luxand BabyMaker and in20years.co) — AI-powered image generation

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:1. Introduction
sentence: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, how long we retain it, and what rights you have. It applies to all Luxand websites, products, and services, including: liveness.luxand.com — Passive liveness detection

sentence: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, how long we retain it, and what rights you have. It applies to all Luxand websites, products, and services, including: Luxand mobile applications

sentence: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use it, who we share it with, how long we retain it, and what rights you have. It applies to all Luxand websites, products, and services, including: luxand.com — Corporate website

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:1. Introduction
sentence: This policy does not cover third-party websites or services linked from our sites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party services you use.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:2. Data Controller
sentence: Luxand, Inc. 700 N Fairfax Street, Suite 614C Alexandria, VA 22314 United States

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:2. Data Controller
sentence: Contact: info@luxand.com

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:2. Data Controller
sentence: For purposes of the EU General Data Protection Regulation ("GDPR"), Luxand, Inc. is the data controller. For purposes of US state privacy laws, Luxand, Inc. is the business that collects your personal information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What this service does: Luxand.cloud is a cloud-based API that enables customers to detect faces in photographs, extract facial recognition templates, enroll faces for recognition, and perform face matching, verification, and search operations.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: BIOMETRIC DATA NOTICE: The Luxand.cloud Face API collects and stores biometric identifiers and biometric information as defined under applicable biometric privacy laws, including the Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act (740 ILCS 14/1 et seq.). Specifically, the API extracts and stores scans of face geometry (facial recognition templates) from photographs uploaded by API customers.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Photographs uploaded via the API for face detection, recognition, and enrollment

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Facial recognition templates (mathematical representations of facial geometry) extracted from uploaded photographs

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Person metadata (person UUID, name if provided, creation date, last activity date)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Face metadata (face UUID, associated person, creation date)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: API usage logs (request timestamps, endpoints called, API key used)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: How we use it: Facial recognition templates are created and stored solely to provide face recognition, verification, and search services as requested by the API customer. We do not use biometric data for any other purpose. We do not sell, lease, trade, or otherwise profit from biometric identifiers or biometric information. Biometric data is not used for advertising, marketing, or any form of behavioral targeting.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Customer obligations: Luxand.cloud is a business-to-business (B2B) service. API customers are responsible for: Providing all notices required by applicable law to individuals whose biometric data is processed through the API

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Customer obligations: Luxand.cloud is a business-to-business (B2B) service. API customers are responsible for: Obtaining all required consents (including written consent where required by law) from those individuals before enrolling their biometric data

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Customer obligations: Luxand.cloud is a business-to-business (B2B) service. API customers are responsible for: Complying with all applicable biometric privacy laws in the jurisdictions where they operate

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Customer obligations: Luxand.cloud is a business-to-business (B2B) service. API customers are responsible for: See our Terms of Service for detailed customer compliance obligations

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Default retention: 1 year from the last API activity (enrollment, update, match, or verification) referencing that template

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Maximum retention: 3 years from last activity, regardless of customer configuration

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Customers may configure shorter retention periods via their account settings

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: See Section 6 (Biometric Data Retention and Destruction Policy) for full details

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Deletion: Customers can delete biometric data at any time using the deletion endpoints provided in the API. Upon account termination, all associated biometric data is permanently destroyed within 30 days.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Data storage and sharing: Biometric data is stored on servers located in the United States, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google Cloud, or IBM Cloud. These hosting providers act as service providers / data processors under contract and are prohibited from using biometric data for their own purposes. We do not share biometric data with any other third parties except as required by law.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What these services do: Our entertainment services, including Luxand BabyMaker, BabyFaceGenerator.com, and in20years.co, use AI image generation technology (Stable Diffusion) to create entertainment images — such as predicted baby photos or aged/future appearance photos — based on photographs you upload.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: No biometric processing: These services use AI image generation to process and transform your uploaded photographs into entertainment images. No facial geometry is extracted, no biometric templates are created, and no biometric identifiers or biometric information (as defined under BIPA or other biometric privacy laws) are collected or stored through these services.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Photographs you upload for image generation

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Generated output images (e.g., baby photos, aged photos)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: How we use it: Uploaded photographs are used solely to generate the requested entertainment images. We do not use your uploaded photographs for advertising, marketing, training AI models, or any purpose other than providing the requested service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Uploaded photographs and generated images: retained for the duration of your account, so you can access them at any time

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Upon account deletion or termination, all associated photographs and generated images are permanently deleted within 90 days

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Data storage and sharing: Photographs are processed and stored on servers located in the United States, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google Cloud, or IBM Cloud. Your uploaded photographs are not shared with any third parties other than these hosting infrastructure providers. We do not sell your photographs.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Deletion: You can delete individual photos or generated images through your account. To delete your account and all associated data, or for any other deletion requests, contact us at info@luxand.com.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What this service does: The passive liveness detection service at liveness.luxand.com allows users to test our liveness detection algorithm by uploading photographs.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: BIOMETRIC DATA NOTICE: When you upload photographs to liveness.luxand.com, your photographs are analyzed for biometric characteristics (facial liveness indicators). This constitutes the collection and processing of biometric information as defined under applicable biometric privacy laws.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Photographs you upload (including both real and simulated/spoofed images)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: What we collect: Technical parameters of your browser or device (device type, camera type, browser type)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: How we use it: Uploaded photographs are used to perform the liveness detection check. If you separately consent to algorithm improvement, your photographs may also be used to train, test, and validate our passive liveness detection algorithms. We do not use your photographs for advertising, marketing, or any other purpose. We do not sell your photographs.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Consent: Before uploading photographs, you will be asked to: Consent to the liveness check (required): You consent to Luxand analyzing your photos for biometric characteristics (facial liveness indicators) to perform the liveness check, and confirm that you have read this Privacy Policy and our Terms of Service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Consent: Before uploading photographs, you will be asked to: Consent to algorithm improvement (optional): You may separately consent to Luxand retaining and using your photos to train, test, and validate liveness detection algorithms. This consent is not required to use the service.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Your consent is the legal basis on which we rely when processing your photographs. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us at info@luxand.com.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: With algorithm improvement consent: Photos are retained for up to 1 year from the date of upload, then permanently deleted via automated purge

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Without algorithm improvement consent: Photos are deleted within 90 days of upload

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: Photographs are not associated with your name or email address; however, they may be associated with technical parameters of your browser or device

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Retention: See Section 6 (Biometric Data Retention and Destruction Policy) for full details

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Data storage and sharing: Photographs are stored on servers located in the United States, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS), Google Cloud, or IBM Cloud. We do not transfer or disclose your photographs to any third parties other than these hosting infrastructure providers, which act as service providers under contract. We do not sell your photographs.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.1. Luxand.cloud Face API
sentence: Deletion: If you wish to request deletion of your photographs, contact us at info@luxand.com with details sufficient to identify your submission (e.g., approximate date and time of upload, device used). We will make commercially reasonable efforts to locate and delete your photographs. Because photographs are not linked to identifying information, we may not always be able to locate specific photos; however, all photographs are automatically purged after 1 year (or 90 days if algorithm improvement consent was not given).

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What this service does: Luxand FaceSDK is an on-premises, cross-platform software development kit for face recognition. The SDK runs entirely on the customer's own hardware and infrastructure. Luxand does not receive, process, or store any biometric data (facial templates, photographs, or face geometry) through FaceSDK.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: Device type and hardware identifier

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: Operating system name and version

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: IP address

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: License key used for activation

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: Information about other Luxand license keys

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use Luxand FaceSDK, we automatically collect the following device information for license activation purposes: Software and hardware configuration

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: How we use it: This information is used solely for license activation, enforcement, and product compatibility purposes. It is not used for advertising or marketing.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.4. Luxand FaceSDK
sentence: Biometric data: Luxand does not collect, receive, store, or process any biometric data through FaceSDK. All biometric processing occurs on the customer's own infrastructure. Customers deploying FaceSDK are solely responsible for complying with all applicable biometric privacy laws, including providing notices, obtaining consents, and establishing retention and destruction policies. See our [FaceSDK License Agreement] for customer compliance obligations.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.5. Mobile Applications
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use our mobile applications, we automatically collect: Device type, operating system version, device identifier (UDID)

sentence: What we collect: When you download and use our mobile applications, we automatically collect: Advertising identifier (IDFA on iOS, Google Advertising ID on Android)

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.5. Mobile Applications
sentence: What we collect: When you download and use our mobile applications, we automatically collect: App usage analytics via Facebook SDK and AppsFlyer SDK

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.5. Mobile Applications
sentence: How we use it: Device and usage data is used for app analytics, performance monitoring, and advertising attribution. Advertising identifiers may be shared with advertising partners for ad measurement and attribution purposes — see Section 8 (Third-Party Services) for details.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:4. Product-Specific Data Practices > H4:4.5. Mobile Applications
sentence: Push notifications: Our mobile applications may send push notifications for service updates, marketing communications, or location-based alerts. You can opt out of push notifications at any time through your device settings.

sentence: When you visit our websites, create an account, contact us, or subscribe to communications, we collect: Information you provide directly: name, email address, phone number, company name, country, website URL

Rev. Stat. 6-1-1314), and other applicable biometric privacy laws.

sentence: Illinois (BIPA): If you are a resident of Illinois, we collect and store biometric identifiers and biometric information (scans of face geometry / facial recognition templates) through the Luxand.cloud Face API and liveness detection service. We do not sell, lease, trade, or otherwise profit from biometric identifiers or biometric information. Our Biometric Data Retention and Destruction Policy is set forth in Section 6. Customers of Luxand.cloud are contractually required to provide written notice and obtain written consent from individuals before enrolling their biometric data.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Texas (CUBI): We do not capture biometric identifiers for a commercial purpose without first providing notice and obtaining consent. Biometric data is destroyed within a reasonable time, not to exceed 1 year after the purpose for collection expires, unless a longer retention period is required by law. Customers of Luxand.cloud are contractually required to provide notice and obtain consent before capturing biometric identifiers.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Washington (Biometric Identifiers Law, RCW 19.375): We do not enroll biometric identifiers in a database for a commercial purpose without providing notice and obtaining consent, or providing a mechanism to prevent subsequent commercial use. Customers of Luxand.cloud are contractually required to comply with these requirements.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Washington (My Health My Data Act, RCW 19.373): Biometric data is included in the definition of "consumer health data" under the Washington My Health My Data Act. We collect biometric data only with notice and consent, do not sell biometric data, and comply with the deletion and access requirements of this law.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: New York City (Biometric Identifier Information Law): Customers deploying Luxand products in commercial establishments within New York City must comply with the NYC Biometric Identifier Information Law, including posting conspicuous signage disclosing the collection of biometric identifier information. Luxand does not sell, lease, trade, or share biometric identifier information for profit.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Colorado (Biometric Identifier Amendments): Our written biometric identifier policy, including retention schedule and destruction guidelines, is set forth in Section 6. We obtain informed consent before collecting biometric identifiers through our services.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Maryland (MODPA): We do not sell sensitive personal data, including biometric information.

section: H1:Privacy Policy of Luxand, Inc. > H3:10. US State Privacy Rights > H4:10.6. State-Specific Notices
sentence: Portland, OR (Facial Recognition Ordinance): Customers deploying Luxand facial recognition products must comply with all applicable local ordinances, including the Portland Facial Recognition Ordinance, which prohibits the use of facial recognition technology by private entities in places of public accommodation within the City of Portland. It is the customer's responsibility to determine whether their use case is subject to this ordinance.

sentence: Our services are not directed to children under the age of 16 (or the applicable age of consent in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
